patch.value: Strengthen the MCP server and machine-readable contracts: tool parity, protocol coverage, contract versioning and drift gates
Strengthen the MCP server and machine-readable contracts: tool parity, protocol coverage, contract versioning and drift gates
MCP tool surface stays in lockstep with CLI flags via contracts gates; narrow tools cover all frequent operations; zero action-schema drift findings.

## Charter
Living capability epic for the MCP server and machine-readable contract platform: narrow pm_* tools (28 at 2026-07-04), tool/action parity with the CLI, schema contracts, contract versioning, and drift gates.

## Scope
- In: mcp/server.ts tool surface, PM_TOOL_ACTIONS/SCHEMA_CONTRACTS coherence, MCP envelope semantics, compact defaults, shared enums (scope), contracts --full.
- Out: CLI flag surface itself (pm-mpbb), SDK authoring APIs (pm-ugqx).

## Invariants this epic guards
- Every PM_TOOL_ACTIONS entry NEEDS a matching SCHEMA_CONTRACTS entry or contracts --full crashes (PR#357 lesson).
- Tool count is asserted in 4 places; contracts:update is a separate static gate.
- MCP param name == camelCase of the full CLI flag; CLI JSON has NO result wrapper (MCP-only envelope).

## Status
25 closed children (extension-aware built-in actions PR#406, action-scoped name schema, narrow tools pm_schema/config/append PR#199, pm_profile). Open as a living backlog — no open children at 2026-07-04; new MCP/contract work lands here.
